title: Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located near Kodaikanal in Dindigul district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located near Kodaikanal in Dindigul district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The sanctuary was created in 2013 to preserve the biodiversity and various species endemic to the Western Ghats region, which is recognised as one of the world's biodiversity hotspots.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kannivadi, Dindigul
topPlaces.description: Kannivadi is a panchayat town in Dindigul District in madurai Division, Kannivadi is one of the largest town panchayats in India, Thoni Malai is a ward in Kannivadi panchayat, which is 25 km from Kannivadi. Kannivadi was one of the largest towns in Madurai district before it was divided into Dindigul district .

topPlaces.name: Pandrimalai
topPlaces.description: Pandrimalai is a village panchayat located in the Dindigul district of Tamil Nadu, India. The latitude 10.3627476 and longitude 77.99234 are the geocoordinate of the Pandrimalai.

topPlaces.name: Sithayankottai
topPlaces.description: Sithayankottai is a panchayat town in Dindigul district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kamarajar Lake
topPlaces.description: Kamarajar Lake is a 400-acre (1.6 km2) monsoon-fed water body 6 km (3.7 mi) from Athoor village in Dindigul District, Tamil Nadu, which is formed by the Kamarajar Sagar Dam. This lake is a beautiful location with the hills of the Western Ghats overlooking it.

items.note: Kannivadi is a panchayat town in Dindigul District in madurai Division, Kannivadi is one of the largest town panchayats in India, Thoni Malai is a ward in Kannivadi panchayat, which is 25 km from Kannivadi. Kannivadi was one of the largest towns in Madurai district before it was divided into Dindigul district .
Pandrimalai is a village panchayat located in the Dindigul district of Tamil Nadu, India. The latitude 10.3627476 and longitude 77.99234 are the geocoordinate of the Pandrimalai.
Sithayankottai is a panchayat town in Dindigul district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Kamarajar Lake is a 400-acre (1.6 km2) monsoon-fed water body 6 km (3.7 mi) from Athoor village in Dindigul District, Tamil Nadu, which is formed by the Kamarajar Sagar Dam. This lake is a beautiful location with the hills of the Western Ghats overlooking it.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kodaikanal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kannivadi, Dindigul, Pandrimalai, Sithayankottai, Kamarajar Lake.
